channel.title: Comments for page "Is Anybody Home?"
channel.description: Posts in the discussion thread "Is Anybody Home?"

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Campfire ghost story calibre, in the best possible way. +1

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
I can’t say I really get it, but I liked it enough

Honestly, this was the reaction I was expecting. Mostly because 2740 is such a vaguely described anomaly, I can't give it a much more concrete form than this while still holding true to the spirit of it.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I can’t say I really get it, but I liked it enough to upvote. Good Job!

item.title: Alternative Title: "Good Girls Are Back By Curfew"
item.content:encoded:
You know, there was a time when I didn't think I was going to have anything to enter in halloween con. But then I sat down for a few hours last night and cranked out this bad boy.

I'm using the "Only One Survivor" and "Halloween Night To New Saints Morning" restraints.

Thanks to djkaktus, Eskobar, DrChandra, Stallmantic, AKFrost, dw3105_, and DarkStuff.

Thanks to A Random Day for the title suggestion.

Hope you enjoy!
